DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-workspace-cli: DingTalk Workspace is an officially open-sourced cross-platform CLI tool from DingTalk. It unifies DingTalk’s full suite of product capabilities into a single package, is designed for both human users and AI agent scenarios.

larksuite/cli: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.
